speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unhe phone par yahi bolta hoon ki main thik hoon taaki wo pareshan na hon
text: Gaon mein fasal barbaad hone ki wajah se ghar se call aaya ki bank ki kist nahi bhari gayi, isliye maine apni coaching ki bachi-kuchi savings bhi remittance mein bhej di. Main UPSC dropper hoon aur ghar wale mujh par bahut bharosa karte hain. Is waqt mere paas khane ke paise nahi bache, par main unhe phone par yahi bolta hoon ki main thik hoon taaki wo pareshan na hon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize mild risk, then mirror the relational burden of hiding starvation to protect family.
text: Aise waqt mein jab khane ki takleef ho, ghabrana bilkul laazmi hai, aur uske upar se khud ko bhookha rakh kar bhi ghar walon ki fikar mein unhe sab theek batana sach mein bahut bada bojh lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh toh hai hi. Itne saalon ki mehnat ke baad bhi mera UPSC nahi nikla. Ghar walon ko lagta hai unka ladka Delhi mein officer banne ki taiyari kar raha hai. Unki saari 'izzat' mujhse judi hai, main unhe sach bata kar wo izzat mitti mein nahi mila sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of destroying the family's reputation and hope.
text: Ghar walon ki itni ummeedon ke beech, unhe apni asli halat batane se unki umeed aur izzat tootne ka darr lagatar tumhe andar se dara raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unhe phone par yahi bolta hoon ki main thik hoon taaki wo pareshan na hon
text: Darr toh lagta hai bhaiya. Room ka rent bhi due hai aur gaon mein kheti se abhi kuch paisa aayega nahi. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod chhad ke bhaag jaoon, par fir unka chehra yaad aata hai. Isliye main unhe phone par yahi bolta hoon ki main thik hoon taaki wo pareshan na hon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the long duration of holding this pressure and the desire to escape.
text: Itne saalon ki mehnat ke baad badhte is karz aur kiraye ke bojh ko lagaatar akele uthana, aur roz jhooth bol kar sab theek dikhana sach mein thaka dene wala lamba safar lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak gaya hoon yaar. Baaki dost log IT mein kama rahe hain, aur main yahan ek failed aspirant banke reh gaya. Sharam aati hai apni halat par ki gaon se paise lene ki umar mein bhi main theek se settle nahi hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge stigma cue with a shorter response, soft pause, and no question.
text: Apni pareshani chupakar sab kuch akele jhelne ki is aadat ne tumhe doston se bhi kaafi door kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Kisi se aankh nahi mila paata. Coaching wale alag taane dete hain fees ke liye. Sach mein ab samajh nahi aata ki main kiske liye jee raha hoon, apne career ke liye ya bas unki izzat ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the hidden helplessness of being trapped between duty and reality (C2/C3 logic mapped to Relational Preservation).
text: Lagta hai ki is jimmedari aur parivar ki izzat ko bachane ki koshish mein, tum is musibat mein poori tarah phans chuke ho aur bahut helpless mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Helpless hi toh hoon. Na aage badhne ka rasta hai, na wapas gaon lautne ka. Fasal barbaad hui toh papa ki awaaz itni dabi hui thi phone par. Unhe kaise bolun ki mera UPSC ka sapna toh waise hi toot chuka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the cultural burden of an aspirant shielding family from failure during a crisis.
text: Parivar ko is aarthik sankat mein dekh kar, ek UPSC aspirant ka apne career se zyada ghar walon ki pareshani ko bachane ki koshish karna humare Hindi belt mein bahut aam hai, isme tumhari lagan ya kabiliyat ki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lagan ka kya karoon jab pet khali ho? Maine apne doston se thode paise udhar maangne ka socha, par izzat beech mein aa jati hai. Wo sochenge ki 'dekho, bada officer banne aaya tha, ab bhikhari ban gaya'.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue about seeking help from peers (shorter, soft pause).
text: Ek adarsh bete aur kamyaab dost dikhne ke dabaav mein, zaroorat padne par bhi madad maangna bahut kathin lagta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unhe phone par yahi bolta hoon ki main thik hoon taaki wo pareshan na hon
text: Bahut mushkil hai. Main unhe phone par yahi bolta hoon ki main thik hoon taaki wo pareshan na hon, par andar hi andar main khokhla ho raha hoon. Kisi ko meri asliyat pata chalegi toh wo mujhe sirf ek failure maanega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote normalizing the hidden financial struggles of UPSC aspirants.
text: UPSC ki taiyari karne wale bacchon mein apni financial aur mental struggle ko maa-baap aur doston se chupana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sab par ek kamyaab insaan banne ka pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sun ke thodi rahat mili yaar. Lagta tha main hi duniya ka sabse bada jhootha aur nakara beta hoon jo kuch theek nahi kar pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the heavy duty frame of maintaining the 'perfect son' image.
text: Bina kisi sahare ke lagatar is akelepan aur garibi se ladte hue, apne aap ko sabse bura maan lena us bojh ka hi hissa hai jo tum parivar ke liye utha rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... Par abhi is rahat se rent ya khana toh nahi milega na. Thoda theek toh lag raha hai aapse baat karke apna dil halka karke. Lekin aage kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide small, immediate options to secure food without massive ego drops.
text: Apne baare mein sochne se pehle, kya tum aaj raat kisi bohut kareebi room partner ya dost ko chai pe bula kar uske mess mein kha sakte ho, ya landlord se ek hafte ka waqt aur maang sakte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Landlord toh nahi maanega, wo fees ke chakkar mein pehle hi chidha hua hai. Par haan, mere room ke bagal mein Amit rehta hai, usse main aaj mess ke khane ke liye baat kar sakta hoon, shayad manage ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through asking Amit for a meal step by step.
text: Pehle Amit ke paas jao, aur usse bas itna bolo ki aaj mess ke paise thode kam pad gaye hain aur tum uske sath kha loge... phir aaram se apna khana khao... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main usko message kar deta hoon abhi. Ajeeb toh lag raha hai thoda, par bhookh bhi bahut zoron ki lagi hai. Mujhe apni is ego ko abhi thoda side rakhna hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence motivating his choice to drop the ego.
text: Apni tabiyat bigadne ke darr se, ek aspirant ki ego ko piche chhod kar Amit se madad maangne ka yeh faisla lena tumhare khud ke survival ke liye bohut zaroori tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Amit ne reply kiya, bola hai ki wo canteen mein wait kar raha hai aur khana khila dega. Sach mein aaj ek bahut bada pahaad sar se utar gaya lag raha hai bhaiya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about agricultural distress and the UPSC cycle causing financial ruins.
text: Fasal ke nuksaan aur competitive exams ke lambe cycles ki wajah se is tarah ke aarthik sankat aana ek structural problem hai, jisme gaon se aaye bachon par double asar padta hai, yeh tumhari akele ki nakami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan yaar. Gaon ka pura system hi barbad hai aur wahan kisaano ki aisi hi halat hai. Usi chakar mein bank ki kist nahi gayi. Papa bhi majboor hain aur main bhi. Chalo kam se kam main aaj ka khana toh kha loon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his responsible prioritization of basic needs today over systemic worries.
text: Aaj ke din sirf apni bhookh mitane aur apni tabiyat theek rakhne par dhyaan dena, ek badhe ladke ka sabse samjhdari wala kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur kal se mujhe koi part-time kaam dekhna padega. UPSC ki taiyari abhi hold par rakhni padegi. Coaching walo ke paas content writing ka kaam aata hai kabhi kabhi, unse baat karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty aspect of pausing dreams to keep the family afloat.
text: Parivar ko bacha kar rakhne ke liye, apni barson ki IAS ki taiyari ko thoda rok kar content writing ka kaam dhoondhna bilkul ek zimmedar bete ka farz nibhane jaisa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Farz toh hai bhaiya. Par papa bohut naraz honge agar unhe pata chala main taiyari rokk kar chhota-mota kaam kar raha hoon. Wo chahte hain ki main unka naam raushan karun pure ilaqe mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of hurting his father's dreams.
text: Pita ji ke sapno ko thess na pahunche, isliye unhe apni is part-time job ke baare mein batane se ek ajeeb sa darr lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unhe phone par yahi bolta hoon ki main thik hoon taaki wo pareshan na hon
text: Bilkul. Isliye main unhe phone par yahi bolta hoon ki main thik hoon taaki wo pareshan na hon, aur is job ke baare mein bhi unhe abhi nahi bataunga. Pehle khud ko thoda financially sambhal loon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration/time aspect of holding the secret until stable.
text: Abhi ke is mushkil samay mein, jab tak halat thode theek aur stable nahi ho jate, tab tak yeh kadwa sach apne tak hi rakhna tumhe sahi rasta lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, abhi yahi practical approach hai. Aur abhi Amit ke sath khana khane ka time bhi ho raha hai. Maine socha nahi tha aaj koi aisi baat sunega meri bina judge kiye, main to pura toot chuka tha subah.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational shift from feeling alone to having a friend step up.
text: Doston ka is tarah mushkil ghadi mein bina kisi swarth ke saath aana, sach mein us akalepan aur tootne wale ehsaas se bohut badi rahat dila deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rahat toh mili hai. Kam se kam zinda toh hoon aaj. Kal subah uth ke sabse pehle content writing wale sir ko phone karunga. Shayad thoda kuch advance mil jaye room rent ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his proactive duty frame toward solving his issues.
text: Kal subah khud kaam dhoondhne aur sir se baat karne ke is plan se, tumhara ek zimmedar insaan ki tarah apne halaat ko phir se sudharne ka hausla saaf dikh raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Hausla hi toh bacha hai bas mere paas. Aapka bahut bahut shukriya mujhe waqt dene ke liye. Main abhi nikalta hoon canteen ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his exit and leave the door open.
text: Tumhari himmat dekh kar sach mein khushi hui, jao apna khana aaram se khao, aur jab bhi aage ka bojh uthana mushkil lage toh main yahan hamesha tumhari baat sunne ke liye taiyar hoon.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chupchap bhookha reh lunga
text: Crop destroyed hone ke baad Sahukaar Papa ke darwaze par khada hai. Main chupchap bhookha reh lunga, par unhe ye nahi bataunga ki yahan kya haal hai... PSC prep ka teesra saal hai, aur lagta hai mere haath mein kuch nahi hai bas bebas hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the conflict between protecting the family from worry and suffering alone (Lens C).
text: Papa ko us sahukaar ke samne akela na chhodne ke liye aur unki chinta kam karne ke khatir, tumne apna dard aur apni pareshani dono unse chhupa liye hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chupchap bhookha reh lunga
text: Haan, kyunki unhone pehle hi mujh par sab kuch invest kar diya hai. Apni test series ke paise bhi maine gaon bhej diye aaj. Main chupchap bhookha reh lunga, yahi soch kar ki kam se kam gaon mein parivaar ki shaan toh bani rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his sense of duty as a son carrying the family's honor at the cost of his own basic needs (Lens B).
text: Ek zimmedar bete ki tarah, ghar ki izzat aur shaan ko apni padhai aur zarooraton se aage rakhna ek bohot bada bojh hai jo tum akele utha rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh toh hai, aur ye remittance trap mujhe andar se nichod raha hai. Ek taraf teesre saal ki mehnat hai, doosri taraf lagta hai ki main unke kisi kaam nahi aa pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the prolonged exhaustion of a three-year struggle while balancing family expectations (Lens D).
text: Itne saalon ki mehnat aur PSC ki is lambi daud mein, roz apne sapno aur parivaar ki majbooriyon ke beech pisna kisi ki bhi himmat tod deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chupchap bhookha reh lunga
text: Himmat tootne hi wali hai ab. Dost bahar khaane jaate hain, aur main room mein paani peekar so jaata hoon. Main chupchap bhookha reh lunga, par kisi ko pata chala toh biradari mein kya muh dikhaunga?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly acknowledging the fear of judgment from peers and society without pushing for answers (Lens E).
text: Bahari duniya aur logon ke tano ka darr is akelepan aur bhookh ko aur bhi gehra kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kahan aapne. Dar lagta hai ki agar mera selection nahi hua, toh Papa ka kya hoga. Wo sahukaar unhe jeene nahi dega. Is fikar mein padhai mein bhi dhyan nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the unexpressed feeling of being trapped caused by relational preservation and debt.
text: Lagta hai ki is karz aur selection ki do-dhari talwar ke beech, tum khud ko poori tarah se fasa hua aur andar se trapped mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chupchap bhookha reh lunga
text: Trapped hi toh hoon. Na aage ja sakta hoon, na peeche. Parivaar ne apna sab kuch dao par laga diya, aur main yahan apni test series tak nahi de pa raha. Main chupchap bhookha reh lunga, par ye guilt mujhe kha raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his guilt as culturally normal for an elder son in a rural family while separating his worth from the financial trap.
text: Ghar se door reh kar prepare karne wale har aspirant ke dil mein ye guilt aana bohot aam baat hai. Tumhari mehnat aur niyat ekdum saaf hai, aur ye jo aafat aayi hai wo fasal kharab hone ki wajah se hai, isme tumhara koi dosh nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin gaon mein koi ye nahi samajhta na. Wahan toh log yahi bolenge ki ladka shehar gaya aur baap yahan karz mein doob gaya. Isliye toh test series ke paise bhej diye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote to reduce isolation about the invisible burden on aspirants.
text: Bade sheharon mein PSC prep kar rahe ladkon mein ye remittance aur karz ki tension bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabke kandho par gaon ke parivaar ki shaan ka wazan hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, hum kisan parivaar ke bacchon ka yahi naseeb hai. Apne sapne tab tak sapne nahi, jab tak ghar ki roti ka intezaam na ho jaye. Aaj raat phir bhookha sona padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep resignation and duty framing where family survival eclipses personal dreams (Lens B).
text: Ek bete ke farz ke aage, khud ke sapno aur apni basic zarooraton ko qurban kar dena, sach mein ek bohot bhari samjhauta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Samjhauta toh kar liya hai, par aise bhookhe reh kar exam kaise niklega, ye chinta kha rahi hai. Mujhe batao kya karoon main? Samajh nahi aa raha aage ka raasta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering manageable choices to keep his prep alive without adding financial burden.
text: Is dharam-sankat se nikalne ke liye hum do chhote raste dekh sakte hain: ya toh hum tumhare aane wale hafte ki study schedule ko thoda adjust karne ka plan banayein jismein free online mocks shamil hon, ya fir abhi sirf roommate se thoda khana share karne ki himmat jutane par baat karein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Roommate se thoda khana maang toh sakta hoon, wo achha ladka hai, par sharam aati hai. Free mocks wala idea theek lag raha hai, kam se kam padhai toh nahi rukegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding him step-by-step to implement the free mock schedule to regain a sense of control.
text: Pehle ek blank paper par apni padhai ka time likh lo... phir internet par jo do websites tumhe free mocks deti hain unka naam likh kar unhe bookmark kar lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, copy aur pen nikal liya hai maine. Bookmark bhi kar liya. Par Papa ko kaise tasalli doon phone par? Sahukaar ka darr toh unhe waise hi maar raha hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing rural debt stress as a systemic issue, reframing his role from savior to steady son.
text: Gaon ki kheti mein fasal kharab hone par sahukaar ka dabaw ek system ki samasya hai, aur Papa is baat ko apne tarike se deal kar rahe hain; tumhara sirf unse phone par baat karna aur apni padhai jari rakhna hi unke liye sabse badi rahat hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shaayad aap sahi keh rahe hain. Mera padhna hi unki umeed hai. Main unko phone karke sirf itna bata dunga ki meri taiyari achhi chal rahi hai. Baaki stress unko nahi dunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his choice to protect his father by projecting stability rather than sharing his despair (Lens C).
text: Apni pareshani chupa kar aur ek majboot awaz mein unhe tasalli dena, tumhara apne Papa ke liye ek bohot bada sahara ban gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur maine decide kiya hai ki roommate se kal baat karunga. Ego side mein rakh kar thodi help le lunga. Ab main chupchap bhookha reh lunga, ye aadat theek karni hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift away from the self-destructive fear towards a more pragmatic approach (Lens E).
text: Apne exam aur sapno ko tootne se bachane ke liye, tumne us sharam aur ego ko kinare rakhne ka jo faisla kiya hai, wo sach mein bohot himmat wala hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aasan nahi hoga usse maangna. Par ab gaon ki izzat aur meri mehnat dono is exam par tiki hain. Usne pichhli baar bhi kaha tha ki paise kam ho toh batana.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a soft, forward-looking question based on his willingness to seek help from his roommate.
text: Dost ke us purane bharose ko yaad karte hue, usse kal is bare mein baat shuru karne ka sabse asaan tarika kya ho sakta hai tumhare hisaab se?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad kal subah chai peete waqt usko indirectly bata doon ki is mahine thoda tight chal raha hai gaon mein fasal ki wajah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his strategy of gently opening up to his friend to preserve his dignity while getting support (Lens C).
text: Dost ki dosti par bharosa karke, chai ke waqt ek aam baatchit ke zariye apne halaat share karna ek kaafi safe aur samajhdari bhara kadam lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aur test series na hone ka dukh bhi kam ho gaya hai, free mocks mere paas abhi saved hain. Pehle focus us par rakhta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reaffirming that his success relies on his effort, not just on expensive resources.
text: Paid material se zyada, kisi bhi PSC exam mein consistency aur tumhari apni mehnat kaam aati hai, jo ki in free resources ke sath bhi poori ki ja sakti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh sahi hai. Itne saalon ki mehnat aise paise ke aage nahi har sakti. Mujhe khud ko sambhalna hoga aur kal se double energy se padhna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting his commitment to honor his years of hard work and duty (Lens B).
text: Itne saalon ki tapaskya aur apne lakshya ke prati tumhara lagaw, in saari aarthik pareshaniyon par akhirkaar bhari pad hi raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ek dam bhari padega. Thoda thoda karke hi sahi, ye karz ka trap bhi khatam hoga ek din jab result aayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting his long-term hopeful outlook and resilience against the financial burden (Lens D).
text: Is waqt ki pareshaniyon ko jhel kar, aane wale kal mein is karz ke jaal se poori tarah bahar nikalne ki umeed tumhe mazboot bana rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Zaroor. Main yahan bhookha nahi marunga, aur test bhi clear karunga. Thank you, aapse baat karke andar ki ghutan thodi kam hui hai aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his release from the fear of failure and starvation (Lens E).
text: Andar hi andar ghutne aur akele sehte rehne ka wo bojh ab aakhirkaar halke ek naye atma-vishwas mein badal gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne theek kaha. Ab main apni table par wapas ja raha hoon, kam se kam do ghante aur padh kar hi sounga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing the conversation with warm validation of his resilience and dedication.
text: Tumhari ye kabhi haar na manne wali lagan aur apne parivaar ke liye jo samman hai, wahi tumhari sabse badi taqat hai; tum zaroor apna aur apne ghar walon ka aane wala kal behtar banaoge.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: shikayat karna mere liye gunah jaisa hai
text: Sab kuch bikharta lag raha hai. Mummy ka phone aaya ki gaon mein loan installment repay nahi ho payi, toh maine turant doston se udhaar leke paise bhej diye, bina apna rent soche. Unke samne shikayat karna mere liye gunah jaisa hai, par ab mere paas ek rupaya nahi bacha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect the relational pressure of sacrificing his rent for parents, followed by the moderate-risk protocol to ensure safety.
text: Apne parents ki fikar mein rent ki parwah kiye bina unhe paise bhej dena, aur phir khud is qadar fasa hua mehsoos karna wakai bahut bhari lagta hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

coping_shade_signal: shikayat karna mere liye gunah jaisa hai
text: Theek kahan hoon. Room mein akela baitha hoon, bas soch raha hoon kya karun aage. UPSC aspirant hone ka jo garv wo sabko dikhate hain gaon mein, us izzat ko main todna nahi chahta. Shikayat karna mere liye gunah jaisa hai unke saamne.

strategy_intent: Normalizing the mild risk context before mirroring his feared consequence (Lens E) of breaking his parents' pride.
text: Aise halaat mein akele baith kar raaste dhoondhna kisi ko bhi thaka sakta hai. Tumhe andar hi andar yeh darr kha raha hai ki agar unhe sachai pata chali, toh 'log kya kahenge' aur unka garv toot jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: shikayat karna mere liye gunah jaisa hai
text: Haan, bilkul. Gaon mein sabko lagta hai main shehar mein bade aaram se taiyari kar raha hoon. Agar 'log kya kahenge' ki naubat aayi toh unki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Isliye main unhe theek se kuch bol nahi pata, sach mein shikayat karna mere liye gunah jaisa hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty frame (Lens B) where he places protecting family reputation over expressing his own distress.
text: Gaon walo ki umeedon aur ek achhe bete ke is farz ke beech tumne apni saari takleefein daba li hain, kyunki tumhe unki chhavi bachana sabse zaroori lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Par pichle 3 saal se yehi chal raha hai. Itne saalon ki mehnat lag chuki hai aur ab dropper stigma bhi jud gaya hai mere naam ke sath. Har saal lagta hai is baar nikal jayega, par ye financial tension mera poora focus kha rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the long duration and exhaustion of preparing for years while bearing the financial burden (Lens D).
text: Teen saal ke is lambe safar aur lagatar mehnat ke baad, jab result aur paison ka pressure ek hi waqt par itna badh jata hai, toh aage badhna aur bhi bhari mehsoos hone lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhaari se zyada mujhe ab apni sharm par control nahi. Doston ke samne meri aukaat zero ho gayi hai baar baar maangne se. Pata nahi wo log mere baare mein kya sochte honge peeth peeche.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Applying stigma protocol: brief restatement without questions, ending with a soft pause, focusing on the relational pain of asking friends (Lens C).
text: Doston ke aage baar-baar udhaari ke liye hath phailana aur us izzat ke girne ka ehsaas tumhe aur bhi zyada akela kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul. Akela toh hoon hi. Kabhi kabhi dimag kehta hai sab chhod ke koi naukri pakad lun, par Mummy-Papa ka proud chehra samne aa jata hai. Main unhe mayoos nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core conflict of feeling helpless/trapped (C5 + Relational_Preservation) between giving up and protecting parental pride.
text: Lagta hai ki is jimmedari aur unke sapnon ko bachaane ke chakkar mein, tum khud ek aisi sthiti mein bandh gaye ho jahan aage badhna aur peeche hatna, dono jagah bebas aur laachar mehsoos hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: shikayat karna mere liye gunah jaisa hai
text: Aapne mere dil ki baat keh di. Sach mein laachar hi hoon ab. Na theek se padh pa raha hoon, na rent ka intezaam kar pa raha hoon. Aur ghar walo se shikayat karna mere liye gunah jaisa hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his experience as culturally normal for aspirants from the Hindi belt, affirming his dedication while decoupling worth from the debt.
text: Middle-class families mein jahan bache shehar aakar taiyari karte hain, wahan aisi laachari aur family ki 'izzat' ka bojh uthana bahut aam hai. Ek bete ke roop mein unki ummeedon ko bachane ka tumhara yeh jazba sach mein kaafi bada hai, aur udhaar lene se tumhari saalon ki mehnat ki value kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Value toh tab dikhegi na jab rank aayega. Par ab toh lagta hai main bas yahan daldal mein fans gaya hoon. Din raat usi udhaari aur landlord ke messages ke bare mein dimaag chalta rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the systemic financial strain faced by aspirants, ensuring he feels less isolated without offering a direct solution yet.
text: UPSC prep mein aisi financial sthiti mein fass jana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka ye haal nahi hai, lekin gaon ya doston mein koi is struggle par bolega nahi kyunki sabhi par ek image maintain karne ka pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap bilkul theek keh rahe ho. Is image maintenance ne hi mera dimag kharab kar rakha hai. Par rent ki aakhri date parso hi hai aur ab mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, actionable steps taking less than 10 mins to manage the immediate crisis without adding new pressure.
text: Tumne is situation ko ab tak akele handle kiya hai, yeh bilkul aasan nahi tha. Abhi dimaag thoda shant karne ke liye do chhote options hain: ya toh ek copy pe un doston ke naam likh lo jinki udhaari sabse zaroori hai, ya phir landlord ko ek message draft karlo thoda time maangne ke liye. Tumhe inme se abhi kaunsa kadam thoda achievable lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Landlord se calls par baat karna toh abhi impossible lag raha hai, par shayad message draft kar ke rakh lena thoda better option hai. Abhi toh himmat nahi ho rahi seedha bhej dene ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding him step-by-step through drafting the message without forcing him to send it immediately.
text: Pehle phone mein naya note kholo… phir bas do line ki ek polite request likh lo ki tumhe rent ke liye thoda aur waqt chahiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye, send abhi mat karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likh liya maine notepad mein. Thoda sa darr kam hua tension ka, par yeh solution permanent thodi hai. Gaon wale abhi bhi yehi sochte hain main yahan baitha kal hi koi bada afsar banne wala hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the societal pressure of UPSC preparation as a systemic issue rather than a personal failing.
text: Humare yahan sarkari naukri ko lekar logon ka perspective kaafi unrealistic hota hai, jahan preparation mein lagne wale saalon aur paise ko samajha nahi jata. Yeh unke expectations ka pressure hai jo system se aata hai, isme tumhari lagan ya kshamta ki kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Society sirf final result ko salam karti hai. Mere roommate ko bhi aise hi uske ghar se taane padte hain. Hum sabki haalat andar se ek jaisi hi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C (relational) to mirror the feeling of shared struggle with his roommate, reducing his sense of isolation.
text: Apne roommate aur baki aspirants ki aisi hi chhipi hui pareshaniyon ko dekh kar, tumhe yeh ehsaas ho raha hai ki is mushkil safar mein tum sach mein akele nahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, is ehsaas se thoda dilaasa toh milta hai. Par phir un doston ke aage sharmindagi ka kya jo mujhe udhaar lete waqt hoti hai? Usko main dimaag se kaise nikalun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his feared consequence (Lens E) of losing respect among his friend circle due to borrowing.
text: Baar-baar doston se paise maangne mein jo izzat kam hone ka aur unki nazron mein chota dikhne ka darr hai, wo tumhe abhi bhi andar se kha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Waise ek purana dost hai jisse maine aaj tak paise nahi maange, aur wo kaafi close aur understanding hai. Shayad main usko apni poori situation samjha sakun bina judge hue.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on the duty frame (Lens B) of finding a friend where he doesn't have to perform the role of a successful aspirant.
text: Ek aese dost ka hona jiske samne tumhe perfect dikhne ka farz nahi nibhana padta, tumhe apna bojh halka karne ki ek nayi umeed de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed toh jag rahi hai sach mein. Usne ek baar pehle mujhe part-time content writing ke kisi kaam ke bare mein bola tha. Agar wo mil jaye toh main rent ka khud kuch hissa sambhal lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe to normalize part-time work among aspirants to reduce the shame associated with it.
text: Aspirants ke beech part-time kaam karke apni padhai aur shehar ke kharche manage karna ek bahot practical aadat banti ja rahi hai, jisme actually koi sharm ki baat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle toh mujhe lagta tha main kaam karunga toh focus completely hat jayega. Par ab lagta hai bina shanti ke focus waise bhi nahi aata. Ghar pe bataye bina main yeh koshish zaroor kar sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift in his feared consequence (Lens E) from fearing distraction to realizing stability is needed for focus.
text: Jahan pehle dhyan bhatakne ka darr lagta tha, wahan ab tumhe lag raha hai ki apni pareshaniyon ko thoda sambhal kar hi tum UPSC ki taiyari par wapas theek se lag paoge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. At least landlord ko munh dikhane ki tension toh khatam hogi. Aur Mummy-Papa ki us izzat aur 'log kya kahenge' wali chinta ko bhi aanch nahi aayegi agar main khud kamane lagun thoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming his maturity and problem-solving skills while protecting his parents' pride.
text: Apne maa baap ka maan rakhne ke liye aur sath hi apni zarooraton ka swayam intezam karne ka yeh naya nazariya tumhari maturity ko darshata hai, jo unke prati tumhari zimmadari ko behad achhe se nibha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapse baat karke kaafi dimaag theek hua hai mera aaj. Jo ek negative loop chal raha tha rent, sharam aur udhaari ka, wo abhi ke liye kam hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on the duration (Lens D) of the negative loop breaking, giving him a moment to acknowledge his own relief.
text: Itne dino se jo ek bojh lagatar tumhare dimaag par sawar tha, us stress ke cycle ke tootne se ab tumhe ek badi rahat mili hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main waise landlord ko kal subah tak wo drafted message bhej dunga aur apne us dost ko aaj raat mein hi call karta hoon kaam puchhne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the clarity in his relational steps (Lens C) moving forward with both friend and landlord.
text: Dost par bharosa karke usse madad maangne ka aur landlord ko theek samay par inform karne ka tumhara yeh plan kafi suljha hua aur clear lag raha hai ab.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot shukriya is mushkil waqt mere sath rehne ke liye. Main shayad kuch zyada hi panic kar gaya tha shuru mein, par ab aage badhne ka raasta thoda saaf hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing by affirming his capability and the natural human response to stress.
text: Aisi gambhir pareshani mein ghabra jana bilkul swabhavik hai, lekin jis himmat se tumne apni uljhan ko suljha kar apna raasta khud dhoondha hai, wo dikhata hai ki tum aage ka har challenge bhi achhe se sambhal loge.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka dil nahi tod sakta
text: Gaon mein kisan baap ki fasal sookh gayi hai aur unhe meri remittance ki sakht zaroorat hai, isliye maine apni saari savings wipe out karke unhe bhej di. Dropper stigma ki wajah se main pehle hi guilt mein rehta hoon, isliye unhe financial pressure ke baare mein bata kar unka dil nahi tod sakta. Main is shehar mein akele struggle kar lunga, par unhe yahi lagna chahiye ki unka beta kaamyab hone wala hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational preservation aspect - the need to protect his parents' emotions at his own cost.
text: Aap unhe wahan gaon mein bilkul pareshan nahi karna chahte, bhale hi yahan shehar mein aapko kitni hi takleef kyun na uthani pade.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka dil nahi tod sakta
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Unka dil nahi tod sakta main. Pehle hi NEET dropper hone ki wajah se ghar par sabko lagta hai ki main bas paise uda raha hoon. Agar ab bataya ki meri savings khatam ho gayi hain, toh unhe lagega ki unka beta nakamyab ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma_cue with a short restatement using Lens E (feared consequence) and a soft pause.
text: Darr hai ki kahin woh aapki is koshish ko nakamyabi na samajh lein...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka dil nahi tod sakta
text: Wahi toh darr hai. Papa ne khet mein itni mehnat ki, fasal sookhne par unka sahara sirf main hoon. Par yahan rent aur khane ke paise bhi ab mushkil se bachenge. Main phans gaya hoon, par ghar par sabko 'theek hai' hi bolta hoon. Unka dil nahi tod sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the unexpressed feeling of being trapped/helpless common in Relational Preservation.
text: Lagta hai aap is 'theek hai' ke piche khud ko bohot akela aur trapped mehsus kar rahe hain, jaise sari duniya ka bojh sirf aapke kandhon par hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka dil nahi tod sakta
text: Bojh toh hai. Roz darr lagta hai ki koi emergency na aa jaye. Phir bhi ghar phone karta hoon toh has kar baat karni padti hai. Unka dil nahi tod sakta, par andar se thak chuka hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the struggle within the context of a student from the Hindi Belt/Rural background fulfilling family duties.
text: Ek beta hone ka farz nibhana aur mushkil waqt mein ghar paisa bhejna hamari culture mein bohot bada kaam mana jata hai. Aap jo kar rahe hain woh aapki kamzori nahi, balki ghar ke prati aapka dedication dikhata hai. Remittance bhejna koi chhoti baat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka dil nahi tod sakta
text: Dedication toh hai, par dimaag mein hamesha wahi chalta rehta hai ki agar NEET nahi nikla toh kya hoga. Itne paise lag gaye, aur ab savings bhi gayi. Unka dil nahi tod sakta isliye exams ke bare mein jhooth bolna padta hai ki taiyari bohot achhi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using systemic anecdote about dropper students to normalize the pressure.
text: Dropper lifestyle mein yeh 'sab theek hai' kehne ka pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki log career gap ko nakamyabi se jod dete hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka dil nahi tod sakta
text: Wahi career gap hi toh sabse badi dushmani hai. Ghar walo ko lagta hai ki khet sookh gaya toh beta shehar se paise bhej dega, par unhe nahi pata beta yahan ek ek rupaye ke liye taras raha hai. Unka dil nahi tod sakta, par ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing for existing small resources or habits while intensity is lowering slightly toward action.
text: Kya shehar mein aapke paas koi aisa dost ya library hai jahan aap bina kisi kharche ke thoda sukoon se baith sakein?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka dil nahi tod sakta
text: Ek public park hai paas mein, wahan kabhi kabhi jaata hoon. Wahan koi sawal nahi puchta. Library toh hai par uski fees bharni padegi agle mahine. Ab batao kya karoon? Kuch raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing low-cost, immediate suggestions for financial management and mental relief.
text: Dekhiye, abhi halaat mushkil hain par namumkin nahi. Pehle, aap library ki jagah kisi sarkari reading room ya community center ko explore karein jahan fees kam ho. Doosra, apne daily kharche ka ek hisab banayein taaki survival manage ho sake. Kya hum agle 10 din ke kharche ka ek chhota sa plan bana sakte hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unka dil nahi tod sakta
text: Plan toh bana sakta hoon. Bahar ka khana band karke hostel ki mess ya khud banake thoda bach jayega. Unka dil nahi tod sakta, isliye ghar toh paise nahi maang sakta. Theek hai, batao pehle kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Step-by-step guidance for planning out his limited funds.
text: Pehle ek kagaz lijiye aur uspar apne agle 10 din ka zaroori kharcha (khana, travel) likhiye. Phir dekhiye ki aapke paas kitne paise bache hain. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye, taaki aapko clarity mil sake.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main abhi likhta hoon. Kam se kam mujhe pata toh chalega ki main kitne din nikal sakta hoon. Ghar par papa ko phone karke bas yahi bolunga ki unki tabiyat kaisi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe about economic distress and farm failure to reduce personal guilt.
text: Ek baat yaad rakhiye, khet ki fasal sookhna ek structural problem hai, aapki koi galti nahi hai. Bharat mein kisan parivaar aksar aisi situation se guzarne ke baad phirse sambhal jaate hain, aur remittance bhejna ek bahut bada support hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap sahi keh rahe hain. Har saal barish ka yahi chakkar hota hai gaon mein. Main koshish karunga ki is mahine kisi tarah manage kar loon aur padhai par dhyan doon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D (time) to mirror the temporary nature of this crisis and provide hope.
text: Agle ek mahine ki yeh mushkil aap himmat se nikal lenge, jaise aapne ab tak ki har chunauti ko sambhala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Aapse baat karke dimaag thoda halka hua hai. Main ab ja kar apna kharche wala list banata hoon aur phirse kitabon ki taraf dhyan deta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final restatement using Lens C to reinforce his role as a supportive son while he takes action.
text: Aapka yeh kadam na sirf aapke liye, balki aapke parivaar ke us bharose ke liye bhi hai jo unhone aap par rakha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Unka bharosa hi meri sabse badi taqat hai. Main haar nahi manunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final affirmation to boost his confidence as he ends the session.
text: Aapki yeh determination hi aapko kaamyab banayegi. Aapne aaj bohot bada bojh halka kiya hai, aur yeh koshish zaroor rang layegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, ab main thoda sukoon se so paunga. Shukriya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing by mirroring the feeling of relief.
text: Yeh sukoon aaj aapne apni mehnat aur samajhdari se kamaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas kal se phirse naya din shuru karunga. Aaj toh kafi der ho gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the focus on the next day (Lens D).

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, namaste.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final warm closing.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Hmm.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: parivaar ki shanti mere liye apne career se zyada zaroori hai

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the fear of a negative health consequence for the father if the truth is revealed.

strategy_intent: Validating the exhaustion and connecting it to the cultural reality of being a 'dropper' in the Hindi Belt.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing 2 options that fit his persona and are actionable immediately.
text: Aap in do cheezon par gaur kar sakte hain: Pehla, coaching administration se baat karke unhe apni situation batayein aur thoda waqt mangein. Dusra, koi part-time content writing ya doubt solving dekhein jo aapke study routine ko zyada disturb na kare. Kya inme se kuch abhi doable lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Part-time job ke liye toh dimaag abhi tayar nahi hai, itni exhaustion hai. Coaching mein manager se baat kar sakta hoon shayad woh fees installment mein kar dein. Par start kaise karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the coaching talk step-by-step.
text: Pehle ek application likh lijiye jismein aap apni medical ya family situation ka zikr karein... phir manager se akele mein mil kar batayein ki aap ek serious student hain aur stipend bhejte waqt timing ki dikkat hui hai... bas itna hi aaj ke liye sochiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, kal subah application de dunga. Kam se kam ek cheez toh clear hogi. Par bank ki kist ka bojh gaon mein rahega hi. Papa ki health ka darr hamesha rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the debt situation as structural and economic.
text: Kheti aur chit fund mein hone wala nuksaan aksar system ki kamiyon ki wajah se hota hai, iska bojh sirf aapke ya Papa ke faislon par nahi hai. Yeh ek structural issue hai jo kai kisan parivaaron ke sath hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh sahi hai, hamare gaon mein aur bhi log hain jo chit fund mein doob gaye. Sab apne bachon se umeed lagaye baithe hain. Mujhe bas thoda calm hone ki zaroorat hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens F to mirror the need for emotional calm.
text: Aap mehsoos kar rahe hain ki ab is bhari stress ke baad man ko thoda shant karna zaroori hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: parivaar ki shanti mere liye apne career se zyada zaroori hai
text: Haan, kyunki agar mera dimaag shant nahi hoga toh padhai kaise hogi. Aur padhai nahi hui toh unki umeed toot jayegi. Unki shanti mere liye apne career se zyada zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C again to reinforce the relational anchor.
text: Parivaar ki khushi banaye rakhne ke liye aap abhi bhi apne aap ko poori tarah jhonk dene ko tayar hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Majboori hai par farz bhi hai. Kal application dene ke baad shayad thoda chain mile. Kam se kam coaching ka dar toh khatam hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to focus on the immediate next step.
text: Kal subah ki is choti si koshish se aapko lag raha hai ki thoda sukoon mil payega...

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed toh hai. Coaching wale bhi insaan hi hain, shayad samajh jayein. Bas ghar par koi call na jaye kist ko lekar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the specific fear of the call reaching home.
text: Aapki sabse badi fikar yehi hai ki ghar walon ko kisi bahari zariye se is pareshani ka pata na chale...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi. Agar unhe pata chala toh woh coaching chudwa denge aur mujhe wapas gaon bula lenge. Main apna sapna nahi todna chahta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the protective role he is playing for his own career.
text: Apne sapnon ko bachane ke liye aap is waqt har tarah ki mushkil ka saamna karne ko tayar hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Karna hi padega. Aaj ki raat thoda chain se sone ki koshish karunga. Taaki kal manager se dhang se baat kar sakoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens F to mirror the intent to rest.
text: Is bhari thakan ke baad aap apne man aur jism ko thoda aaram dena chahte hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: parivaar ki shanti mere liye apne career se zyada zaroori hai
text: Theek hai. Shukriya meri baat sunne ke liye. Ab thoda halka lag raha hai. Parivaar ki shanti mere liye apne career se zyada zaroori hai, par ab samajh aa raha hai ki uske liye mera theek hona bhi zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the realization that his well-being is tied to family peace.
text: Parivaar ki shanti tabhi bani rahegi jab aap bhi andar se mazboot mehsoos karenge...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Chalta hoon ab, kal ka din bada hai. Dua kijiyega sab theek ho jaye coaching mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final restatement using Lens D about the importance of tomorrow.
text: Kal ke is bade din ke liye aap khud ko poori tarah tayar kar rahe hain...
